raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Hate littering has become more prevalent in recent years.",
    "Hate groups prefer distributing flyers and posters with hateful messaging because it maximizes personal impact while allowing anonymity.",
    "According to the Anti-Defamation League, the spread of anti-Semitic flyers is part of a rising trend of anti-Semitic hate.",
    "In 2023, there were more than 3,600 anti-Semitic acts of assault, vandalism, and harassment in the United States, the highest year on record since 1979.",
    "At least eight instances of anti-Semitic flyers were documented on car windshields in San Diego neighborhoods in 2023.",
    "In 2023, hate flyers targeting the Armenian community were distributed in Los Angeles neighborhoods.",
    "A 20% increase in hate-motivated crime events in California was reported from 2021 to 2022.",
    "The tactic of hate littering is difficult for law enforcement to prosecute because it exists in a legal grey area.",
    "The Stop Hate Littering Act will create new legal tools for law enforcement to hold offenders accountable."
  ]
}
```
